cover.title: Keep them speaking Dutch to you
cover.sub: 5 polite lines. All safe with strangers.

phrases.nl: Mag ik het in het Nederlands proberen?
phrases.en: Can I try it in Dutch?
phrases.when: They switch to English to be helpful. The friendliest reset.

phrases.nl: U mag gewoon Nederlands tegen me praten.
phrases.en: You can just speak Dutch to me.
phrases.when: A shop assistant flips to English out of habit.

phrases.en: Can you speak a bit slower?
phrases.when: You understood, you just need it slower.

phrases.nl: Ik leer Nederlands. Ik wil graag oefenen.
phrases.en: I'm learning Dutch. I'd like to practice.
phrases.when: Say it first, before they switch.

phrases.nl: Hoe zegt u dat in het Nederlands?
phrases.en: How do you say that in Dutch?
phrases.when: You got stuck on a word. Keeps them teaching you.

cta.title: Save this for the next time it happens.
cta.sub: Send it to whoever you're learning Dutch with.
